# Ratchet &amp;amp; Clank: QForce

name: Ratchet And Clank Full Frontal Assault: 1P Invincible Mode
mode: once
w32 00050250 60000000

name: Ratchet And Clank Full Frontal Assault: Enter Unlockables To Obtain All Skill Points
mode: once
w32 0031D64C 81210078
